title: Quisumbingia merrillii
taxonomy: Quisumbingia merrillii is classified within the family Euphorbiaceae. This plant is a member of the order Malpighiales. It is further grouped into the family level classification by being a part of the clade Rosidae. Quisumbingia merrillii belongs to the superorder Rosanae and the subclass Rosidae. Further research is required for a more detailed classification of this plant species.
uses: Quisumbingia merrillii is reportedly used in traditional medicine in the Philippines. Its leaves are used to treat various health conditions, including fever and diarrhea.
